title: stanleya albescens
intro: Stanleya albescens, also known as prickly phlox or prickly globe mallow, is a perennial plant native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. Its health benefits include treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and wounds, and also supporting respiratory health by reducing inflammation and congestion. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health issues.
